commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the bundled MiniMax music provider to request streaming hex responses, decode SSE/audio bodies under an operation deadline while preserving JSON/url fallbacks, and adds provider tests for streaming, fallback, and timeout behavior.

PR surface: Source +148, Tests +152. Total +300 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection and live proof, though I did not run a fresh live reproduction. Current main sends URL output with a 120000ms provider fallback, and the source PR reports a 130s live MiniMax provider run succeeding after the patch.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed; the branch has no actionable source finding, so exact-head CI and compatibility acceptance should gate automerge.
